title: Session Monitor
selectPrompt: Select a session to view its replay and timeline
heuristicNote: Status is heuristically inferred (no CLI), not authoritative
compareEmpty: Pick up to 3 sessions from the list to compare their timelines
compareHint: Multi-select up to {{max}} sessions; timelines share one aligned time axis

usage.empty: No token usage for this session
usage.cacheNote: cheap (~0.1×), often dominate the raw token count

switch-sonnet.title: Switch to Sonnet — save ~{{pct}}%
switch-sonnet.detail: Opus dominates this session; repricing those tokens at Sonnet rates saves about ${{usd}}.

thinking-budget.title: High thinking ratio — lower MAX_THINKING_TOKENS
thinking-budget.detail: Thinking is ~{{pct}}% of output tokens; capping the budget could trim it.

low-cache.title: Low prompt-cache hit rate
low-cache.detail: Only {{pct}}% of input is cache reads; check that the system prompt stays stable.

subagents-heavy.title: Tokens concentrated in subagents
subagents-heavy.detail: {{pct}}% of tokens are in subagents; consider converging the fan-out.

topo.empty: No subagents or workflows for this session
